titles.en: The Merits of the Ziyārah of Fāťimah (s.a.), the Daughter of Mūsā ibn Ja’far (a.s.), in Qum
The Merits of the Ziyārah of Fāťimah (s.a.), the Daughter of Mūsā ibn Ja’far (a.s.), in Qum

segments: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ زِيَارَةِ فَاطِمَةَ بِنْتِ مُوسَى (ع) قَالَ مَنْ زَارَهَا فَلَهُ الْجَنَّةُ
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ زِيَارَةِ فَاطِمَةَ بِنْتِ مُوسَى (ع) قَالَ مَنْ زَارَهَا فَلَهُ الْجَنَّةُ

segments: 1. ‘Ali ibn Ḥusain ibn Mūsā ibn Bābawayh narrated to me from ‘Ali ibn Ibrāhīm ibn Hāshim, from his father, from Sa’d ibn Sa’d, who said: I asked Abal Ḥasan (Imam Riďā (a.s.)) about the Ziyārah of Fāťimah, the daughter of Mūsā (a.s.) (Imam Kāżim (a.s.)). Imam (a.s.) said, “Those who go to her Ziyārah will be rewarded with Paradise.”
en.sayyid-mohsen-al-husayni-al-milani.text: 1. ‘Ali ibn Ḥusain ibn Mūsā ibn Bābawayh narrated to me from ‘Ali ibn Ibrāhīm ibn Hāshim, from his father, from Sa’d ibn Sa’d, who said: I asked Abal Ḥasan (Imam Riďā (a.s.)) about the Ziyārah of Fāťimah, the daughter of Mūsā (a.s.) (Imam Kāżim (a.s.)). Imam (a.s.) said, “Those who go to her Ziyārah will be rewarded with Paradise.”

narratorChain.raw: 1 حَدَّثَنِي عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ مُوسَى بْنِ بَابَوَيْهِ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ هَاشِمٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ سَعْدٍ عَنْ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا (ع) قَالَ

parts.text: حَدَّثَنِي عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ مُوسَى بْنِ بَابَوَيْهِ

titles.en: The Merits of the Ziyārah of Fāťimah (s.a.), the Daughter of Mūsā ibn Ja’far (a.s.), in Qum

segments: مَنْ زَارَ قَبْرَ عَمَّتِي بِقُمَّ فَلَهُ الْجَنَّةُ
arabic.text: مَنْ زَارَ قَبْرَ عَمَّتِي بِقُمَّ فَلَهُ الْجَنَّةُ

segments: 2. My father, my brother, and the group narrated to me from Aḥmad ibn Idrīs, and from others, from ‘Amraki ibn ‘Ali Al-Būfaki, from someone whose name he mentioned, who said: The son of Riďā (Imam Jawād (a.s.)) said: Those who go to the Ziyārah of my aunt in Qum will be rewarded with Paradise.
en.sayyid-mohsen-al-husayni-al-milani.text: 2. My father, my brother, and the group narrated to me from Aḥmad ibn Idrīs, and from others, from ‘Amraki ibn ‘Ali Al-Būfaki, from someone whose name he mentioned, who said: The son of Riďā (Imam Jawād (a.s.)) said: Those who go to the Ziyārah of my aunt in Qum will be rewarded with Paradise.

narratorChain.raw: 2 حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي وَ أَخِي وَ الْجَمَاعَةُ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ إِدْرِيسَ وَ غَيْرِهِ عَنِ الْعَمْرَكِيِّ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ الْبُوفَكِيِّ عَمَّنْ ذَكَرَهُ عَنِ ابْنِ الرِّضَا (ع) قَالَ

parts.text: الْعَمْرَكِيِّ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ الْبُوفَكِيِّ عَمَّنْ ذَكَرَهُ
